sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Compare before/after of the second click
before = last_transition.before_frame.segmentation
after = current_frame.segmentation

before_nodes = {n['id']: n for n in before['nodes']}
after_nodes = {n['id']: n for n in after['nodes']}

print("Before:", len(before_nodes), len(before_nodes))
print("After:", len(after_nodes))

for nid in sorted(set(list(before_nodes.keys()) + list(after_nodes.keys()))):
    bn = before_nodes.get(nid)
    an = after_nodes.get(nid)
    if bn and an:
        if bn['color'] != an['color'] or bn['pixels'] != an['pixels']:
            print("Node", nid, "changed: color", bn['color'], "->", an['color'], "pixels", bn['pixels'], "->", an['pixels'])
    elif bn and not an:
        print("Node", nid, "disappeared")
    elif not bn and an:
        print("Node", nid, "appeared")
</parameter>
<parameter=world_model>
